name: Banana Gingerbread Bars
recipeIngredient: 1 small DOLE Banana, peeled and chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Place medium banana in blender. Process until pureed; use 1/2 cup for recipe.
2. Combine gingerbread mix, water, 1/2 cup pureed banana and egg in large bowl. Beat well.
3. Stir in chopped banana, raisins, and almonds.
4. Spread batter in greased 13x9" baking pan.
5. Bake in 350°F oven for 20-25 minutes until toothpick inserted in center comes out clean.
6. Mix powdered sugar and 1/2 cup lemon juice in medium bowl to make glaze.
7. Spread over warm gingerbread.
8. Cool, then cut into bars.
9. Sprinkle with additional powdered sugar if desired.
Makes 32 bars.
